journal.writeDescription: Reflect on your experiences and feelings
journal.continueDescription: Add more thoughts to your journal

emotion.title: Emotion check-in
emotion.emptyDescription: Log how you feel throughout the day

weekSummary.title: This week
weekSummary.emptyEmotions: Log emotions to see your weekly patterns
weekSummary.streakWeek: Amazing! You've been consistent for a whole week!
weekSummary.streakDays: Great streak! Keep the momentum going.
weekSummary.emptyWeek: Start your week strong - every entry counts.
weekSummary.activeWeek: You're building a healthy reflection habit.

weeklyReview.title: Time for your weekly reflection
weeklyReview.description: Review {weekLabel} and set your intention for the week ahead

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.noFocusSentence: No focus sentence set for this week
currentFocus.emptyDescription: Create a monthly plan to align your weekly efforts

ifsCheckIn.title: IFS Check-In
ifsCheckIn.pickPractice: Pick a quick practice to start your day:

commitments.title: Commitments
commitments.placeholder: e.g., Block 30 minutes for a key task
commitments.emptyState: No commitments yet. Add your first to get started.
commitments.noWeeklyPlanError: Please create a weekly plan first

compass.title: Grounding Compass
compass.emptySummary: Set your year, month, and week focus to anchor this view.

northStar.title: North Star
northStar.priorityOnly: Priority held without an active project yet
northStar.noWeekFocus: Set a weekly focus sentence to anchor Today.
northStar.noMonthIntention: Set a monthly intention to connect this week to the wider arc.
northStar.noYearTheme: Add a yearly theme so today stays connected to the longer horizon.
northStar.empty: No active focus chains yet. Link priorities and projects in Planning to make Today more directional.

priorityCompass.title: Keep the day pointed at your priorities
priorityCompass.empty: No active priorities yet. Define them in Planning to turn Today into a clearer compass.

executionList.title: Next Moves
executionList.noWeeklyPlan: Create a weekly plan to turn priorities into concrete moves for this week.
executionList.empty: No commitments for this week yet.

progress.title: Weekly pulse and monthly arc
progress.noWeeklyPlan: No active weekly plan for the current period.
progress.noMonthlyPlan: No active monthly plan for the current period.
progress.emptyWeekly: No weekly trackers or habits selected for this period.
progress.emptyMonthly: No monthly trackers or habits selected for this period.

capture.startJournalDescription: Capture what matters while the day is still alive.
capture.continueJournalDescription: Add another layer to today's reflection.
capture.emotionStart: Catch how you feel before the day blurs together.
capture.emotionContinue: Keep checking the emotional weather as the day unfolds.
capture.emotionComplete: You've already hit the daily target. Log more if the state changes.

support.ifsDone: IFS check-in already logged today. {count} check-ins this week.
support.ifsPending: No IFS check-in yet today. {count} check-ins this week.

intention.morningDescription: Anchor yourself before the day speeds up.
intention.middayDescription: Check state, regulate, and recommit to what matters.
intention.eveningDescription: Reflect on the day and carry learning forward.

execution.title: Execution Board
execution.noWeeklyPlan: No active weekly plan. Create one to unlock commitment and tracker workflows.

nudges.title: Supportive Suggestions
nudges.subtitle: Context-aware, low-noise recommendations
nudges.empty: No recommendation right now. Stay with your current focus.
